title: Verify plan history contract
preconditions: A period containing Draft, Active, and Superseded revisions plus renamed and archived category references is available.
steps: Invoke the relevant Public Budget Operations and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-PLAN-HISTORY, including its validation, lifecycle, compatibility, authority, replay, and unavailable paths where applicable.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-PLAN-HISTORY holds; all documented errors are stable; every rejected or failed mutation leaves the required prior state unchanged; no prohibited side effect occurs.
